2606.16541.title: The Faithfulness Gap: Certifying Semantic Equivalence Between Natural-Language and Formal Mathematical Statements
2606.16541.paper_summary: Autoformalization, translating natural-language mathematics into formal proof assistants, is bottlenecked not by translation fluency but by \emph{faithfulness}: a formal statement can typecheck and be provable, yet still encode a different theorem than the source intended. We introduce \emph{Bidirectional Provability Fingerprinting} (\bpf{}), a framework that certifies faithfulness by characterizing each candidate through its forward and backward consequence neighborhoods in the ambient theory and matching these against probes derived from the natural-language statement. We further introduce four novel components: (i) \emph{Counterfactual Probe Generation} (\cpg{}), a contrastive procedure that synthesizes probes targeting specific drift directions; (ii) the \emph{Equivalence Spectrum}, a continuous faithfulness score that replaces brittle binary verdicts; (iii) \emph{Adaptive Probe Budget Allocation} (\apba{}), an information-theoretic budget router; and (iv) \emph{Faithfulness-Guided Decoding} (\fgd{}), which uses \bpf{} signals as a reward during autoformalization. We prove a \emph{drift detection theorem} and a \emph{PAC-faithfulness} result establishing that the equivalence class of a natural language statement is learnable from $\mathcal{O}(\log(1/δ)/\varepsilon)$ probes under mild assumptions. We release \driftbench{}, a benchmark of $2{,}183$ NL/Lean~4 pairs with controlled drift labels across six subfields of mathlib4. \bpf{}\,+\,\cpg{} detects $89.6\%$ of drifted formalizations at a $3.0\%$ false-positive rate-against $41.2\%$ for typecheck and $63.3\%$ for LLM-judge baselines, and \fgd{} reduces the rate at which a state-of-the-art autoformalizer emits drifted statements by $47\%$. https://pmlrbd.github.io/BPF/
2606.16541.paper_summary_zh: 自動形式化，將自然語言數學轉換為正式證明助手，並不是由於翻譯流暢性而受到瓶頸，而是由於\emph{忠實性}：一個正式陳述可以通過類型檢查並且是可證明的，但仍然可能編碼與來源意圖不同的定理。我們介紹\emph{雙向可證明性指紋}（\bpf{}），這是一個通過在環境理論中表徵每個候選者的前向和後向後果鄰域來認證忠實性的框架，並將這些與從自然語言陳述派生的探針進行匹配。我們進一步介紹四個新組件：（i）\emph{反事實探針生成}（\cpg{}），一種對比程序，合成針對特定漂移方向的探針；（ii）\emph{等價譜}，一個連續的忠實性分數，取代脆弱的二元判決；（iii）\emph{自適應探針預算分配}（\apba{}），一個信息理論預算路由器；以及（iv）\emph{忠實性引導解碼}（\fgd{}），在自動形式化過程中使用\bpf{}信號作為獎勵。我們證明了一個\emph{漂移檢測定理}和一個\emph{PAC-忠實性}結果，確立了自然語言陳述的等價類在輕微假設下是可學習的，所需探針數量為$\mathcal{O}(\log(1/δ)/\varepsilon)$。我們發布了\driftbench{}，這是一個包含$2{,}183$對NL/Lean~4的基準，涵蓋mathlib4的六個子領域並具有受控的漂移標籤。\bpf{}\,+\,\cpg{}以$3.0\%$的假陽性率檢測到$89.6\%$的漂移形式化，而類型檢查的基準為$41.2\%$，LLM-judge的基準為$63.3\%$，並且\fgd{}將最先進的自動形式化器發出漂移陳述的速率降低了$47\%$。 https://pmlrbd.github.io/BPF/
2606.16541.author: Noor Islam S. Mohammad et.al.
2606.16541.authors: Noor Islam S. Mohammad, Tamim Sheikh
